titleStmt.title: SII 10.371: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 371. (A.R. No. 196 of 1905.) ON THE EAST WALL OF THE KITCHEN (VAṆṬA MIDDI) IN FRONT OF THE MAṆḌAPA IN THE SAME TEMPLE. Ś. 1182. (62nd year of Gaṇapatidēva) (Raudri)

summary.p: States that king Gaṇapatidēva gave the villages of • • • pāḍu on the north bank of Guṇḍēṟu (Guṇḍlakamma) in Kammanāṇḍu and Rēḍumaḍapalli on the Musi in Pūṅgi-nāṇḍu to god Tripurāntakadēva. States that Gaṇapatidēva belonged to the Solar race.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīsamastavidyāvilāsinīlāsakarasika sakalajalanidhivēlāmēkhalāvalayitavasumativalaya vijayamālākalita bhujaśikharōttamsa sahasrāṁśuvaṁśāvataṁpa samarasa
masamayasamāhanyamānanissāṇaghōṣasamāka¨rṇanavisa¨rpat bāṣpadhārādhautapratabhaṭabhaṭī gaṁḍa calama¨rttugaṁḍa viṇatasakalanarapatimaṇimakuṭakōṭimakarikācu
ṁbyamānacaraṇakaṁdaḷa mūrurāyajagadaḷa karakaḷitakaravāḷakṣapitavipakṣavilāsinīviḷaṁbamānā ḷaka vallarīvinissāritalalāṭataṭakantūrikātilaka kākati
kulatilaka Aribalajalanidhimathana śūrabhujastaṁbhaparākramāpahasitamaṁdara jagadēkasuṁdara Anumakoṁḍapuravarādhīśvara pratāpalaṁkēśvara paramamā
hēśvara śrīsvayaṁbhūdēvadivyaśrīpādapadmārādhaka parabalasādhaka vibhavavini¨rjita vibudharāju lu naina svasti śrīmatu gaṇapatidēvamahārājulu Ōruṁga
lupuravaramunaṁdu Ācaṁdratārā¨rkkamu Uttarōttarābhiva¨rddhamānasukhasaṁkathāvinōdaṁ bulaṁ pṛthvirājyamu śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu tama divyarājyasaṁ
vatsaramulu 62 Agu srāhi śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1182 Agu nēṁṭi raudrisaṁvatsara Āṣāḍha ba nāṁṭi ka¨rkkaṭakasaṁkramaṇanimittamuna śrīpa¨rvatapū¨rvadvāra śrītripu
rāṁtakadēvara madhyānhasaṁdhya Aṁgaraṁgabhōgālaku kaṁmanāṁṭilōni guṁḍēṭi Uttarapu dikkuna pāḍu Anēṭiyūrūnu pūṁgināṁṭilōni muśikaṟutirēḍuma
ḍapalli Aneḍi yūrūnu catussīmamulūnu sakalāyasahitamugā dhārāpū¨rvakamu śēśi Ācaṁdrā¨rkkasthāyigā nicciri . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yō harēta vasu
ṁdharāṁ . ṣaṣṭiṁ va¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatēkṛmiḥ . śivamantu maṁgaḷamahāśrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 10.371 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
